name: vocabulary-builder
title: Vocabulary Builder
description: Build your vocabulary while learning a new language
author: stefann

commands.name: manage-languages
commands.title: Manage Languages
commands.subtitle: Vocabulary Builder
commands.description: Add, edit and delete your languages

commands.name: statistics-and-overview
commands.title: Statistics and Overview
commands.subtitle: Vocabulary Builder
commands.description: See statistics for your inputs and overview of all the words per language

preferences.name: defaultLanguage
preferences.title: Default Language
preferences.description: Set a default language for quick adding words

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
